title: John D. Rockefeller Sure Prosperity Is Coming Back (1932)
text:
[Music]
next
these are days when many are
discouraged in the 93 years of my life
depressions have come and
gone Prosperity has always returned and
will again and now on this my
birthday I desire to reaffirm my belief
in the fundamental principles upon which
this country was founded
Liberty unselfish Devotion to the common
good and belief in
God as a
nation looking proudly to our past where
it has been Noble and
recognizing with humility our mistakes
of
extravagance
selfishness and IND difference let us
with faith in God in
ourselves and in
humanity go forward courage courageously
resolve to play our part worthily in
building a better world
